query:
SELECT b.*, h.hostName, h.email as hostEmail, h.fullAddress, h.pricePerPerson, h.wechatOrPhone 
FROM bookings b 
JOIN host_listings h ON b.hostListingId = h.id 
WHERE b.paymentStatus = 'paid' 
ORDER BY b.paymentDate DESC 
LIMIT 1;
